description:
Implement `hx-status-indicator` (T3 tier) ‚Äî 2/6 libraries ship this. Colored dot/badge indicating system/entity health status.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-status-indicator/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-status-indicator.ts`, `hx-status-indicator.styles.ts`, `hx-status-indicator.stories.ts`, `hx-status-indicator.test.ts`

**Props:** `status` (`online`|`offline`|`away`|`busy`|`unknown`), `pulse` (boolean ‚Äî animated pulse ring), `size` (sm/md/lg)

**Slots:** none (purely visual)

**CSS Parts:** `base` (the dot), `pulse-ring`

**ARIA:** `role="img"` with `aria-label` describing the status (e.g., "Status: Online"). When decorative (status conveyed by adjacent text), support `aria-hidden="true"`.

**Colors:** Map each status to `--hx-*` semantic tokens: online‚Üísuccess, offline‚Üíneutral, away‚Üíwarning, busy‚Üídanger, unknown‚Üíneutral-muted.

**Animation:** Pulse ring uses CSS keyframe animation. Must respect `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (each status, pulse toggle, accessible label), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all statuses + pulse demo, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-status-indicator ‚Äî T3 Status/Health Indicator
